home.title: Award Websites
home.description: A curated collection of interesting website interactions, animations, and visual effects. Each demo recreates a specific interaction pattern from award-winning websites.
home.noDemos: No demos yet. Check back soon.

followArt.title: follow.art
followArt.description: Interactive hero section with SVG letter scaleY animation driven by mouse position, WebGL 3D card stack with floating animation and parallax effect.

shaderSe.title: shader.se
shaderSe.description: Creative development studio portfolio website featuring 3D model rendering, scroll-driven animations, and interactive project showcase.

animejs.title: Anime.js
animejs.description: A fast, multipurpose and lightweight JavaScript animation library with intuitive API, scroll-driven animations, and modular architecture.
